description_long: This bungalow features a simple, rectangular structure with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, likely stucco or painted siding, and the front facade includes two square windows set symmetrically. A spacious wooden deck with a railing extends from one side, providing an outdoor living area. The roof overhangs the walls, offering some shade and protection from the elements. The overall design is minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on functionality, typical of modern suburban bungalows.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a steep gable roof, light-colored walls, and a side wooden deck with railing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large gable roof, open entry, and partial interior darkness.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical windows and the attached wooden deck with railing.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the expansive roof and minimal visible wall features.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the deck, railing, and the clean, unadorned wall.
